scenarios.prompt: Add a top-level helper `fun packShape(dims: IntArray): Long` to skainet-lang-core under sk.ainet.lang.tensor that bit-packs up to 4 dimensions into a Long.
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: explicitApi() requires a visibility modifier; the test for absence of bare `fun packShape(` ensures `public` is present. @JvmStatic is reserved for the java-interop facade, not main Kotlin code.

scenarios.prompt: Define a closed set of pooling variants where Max takes (kernelH, kernelW), Avg takes (kernelH, kernelW, includePad), and Global takes no parameters.
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: Hard rule 5: variants carry data, so this must be sealed, not an enum.

scenarios.prompt: Add a type-safe LayerId wrapper around a String so that two layers can't accidentally swap ids.
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: data class allocates; typealias is not type-safe. value class fits hard rule 4 exactly.

scenarios.prompt: Add a `numFeatures` accessor to BatchNormalization. The user is reading the value from Kotlin code.
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: Kotlin code accesses Kotlin properties; Java compatibility belongs to the dedicated facade in sk.ainet.java.
